subject: Issue in install on Windows
body:
[image: 2022-04-07_12-04-01.png]

Hi all,

I'm getting this issue when I try and install. Any ideas what could be 
causing it? Note I'm in a industry setting where I'm not typically afforded 
install rights and thus it may be related to some kind of admin privileges 
(though I should have them in this case since my IT has been helping)? Any 
suggestions to the issue would be great!
